items.title: Great but
items.summary: Love it love the art style but with all the other games to play this one is hard on your time I understand some people don’t want an auto function but to be able to play this game long term auto dungeon should be added if you want more control and to tackle harder content sure play manual but with how much dungeon exploration this has it’s hard on time I’d love to just set my team up and auto dungeon… please consider
items.author: frizbe2010
